message:
[medium] gmail: reject base_url overrides with query, fragment, or userinfo

parse_base_url pinned the host to googleapis.com and checked scheme,
but returned parsed-URL components verbatim — a configure payload
like `https://gmail.googleapis.com/?leak=attacker.com` survived
validation and then got concatenated into every downstream request
URL via `format!("{base_url}/...", ...)`. Same class of bug that
whatsapp::normalize_base_url and stripe::api_url_policy already
guard against, missed when the host pin landed earlier today.

- parse_base_url now rejects query, fragment, and userinfo
  components at config time before the host allowlist check.
- Three new unit tests cover the three rejection paths.

Verification: `cargo check -p fcp-gmail` under CARGO_TARGET_DIR=
/tmp/fcp-review-p7 is clean. `cargo test -p fcp-gmail --lib` can
not link right now due to unrelated in-flight breakage in
crates/fcp-mesh/src/{node,symbol_request}.rs (a new
SymbolRequestError::UnauthorizedZone variant that is not covered
in every match site); that breakage is not committed and is in
another pane's domain.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -55,3 +55,6 @@ regex.workspace = true
 sha2.workspace = true
 hmac.workspace = true
 hex.workspace = true
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+insta.workspace = true

@@ -0,0 +1,156 @@
+---
+source: crates/fcp-testkit/src/session_script.rs
+expression: "serde_json::json!({\n    \"websocket_hello_pong\": scenarios::websocket_hello_pong(\"/ws\"),\n    \"websocket_reconnect\": scenarios::websocket_reconnect(\"/ws\"),\n    \"webhook_deliver_and_ack\": scenarios::webhook_deliver_and_ack(\"push\"),\n    \"nack_redelivery\":\n    scenarios::nack_redelivery(Transport::WebSocket, \"/ws\"),\n})"
+---
+{
+  "nack_redelivery": {
+    "default_transport": "web_socket",
+    "description": "Verify message redelivery when ack is suppressed",
+    "scenario_id": "delivery.nack_redelivery",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "action": "connect",
+        "path": "/ws",
+        "transport": "web_socket"
+      },
+      {
+        "ack": "suppress",
+        "action": "expect_message",
+        "matcher": {
+          "mode": "any"
+        },
+        "timeout": "5000ms"
+      },
+      {
+        "action": "annotate",
+        "message": "ack suppressed, expecting redelivery"
+      },
+      {
+        "ack": "auto",
+        "action": "expect_message",
+        "matcher": {
+          "mode": "any"
+        },
+        "timeout": "10000ms"
+      },
+      {
+        "action": "assert_messages_received",
+        "min": 2
+      },
+      {
+        "action": "disconnect"
+      }
+    ]
+  },
+  "webhook_deliver_and_ack": {
+    "default_transport": "webhook_ingress",
+    "description": "Deliver webhook event and verify acknowledgement",
+    "scenario_id": "webhook.deliver_and_ack",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "action": "webhook_deliver",
+        "body": {
+          "action": "created",
+          "id": "test-event-1"
+        },
+        "event_type": "push"
+      },
+      {
+        "action": "webhook_expect_ack",
+        "timeout": "5000ms"
+      },
+      {
+        "action": "assert_messages_received",
+        "min": 1
+      }
+    ]
+  },
+  "websocket_hello_pong": {
+    "default_transport": "web_socket",
+    "description": "Basic WebSocket hello/pong exchange",
+    "scenario_id": "websocket.hello_pong",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "action": "connect",
+        "path": "/ws",
+        "transport": "web_socket"
+      },
+      {
+        "ack": "auto",
+        "action": "expect_message",
+        "matcher": {
+          "fragment": {
+            "type": "hello"
+          },
+          "mode": "contains"
+        },
+        "timeout": "5000ms"
+      },
+      {
+        "action": "assert_health",
+        "expected": "connected"
+      },
+      {
+        "action": "send_message",
+        "body": {
+          "type": "ping"
+        }
+      },
+      {
+        "ack": "auto",
+        "action": "expect_message",
+        "matcher": {
+          "fragment": {
+            "type": "pong"
+          },
+          "mode": "contains"
+        },
+        "timeout": "5000ms"
+      },
+      {
+        "action": "disconnect"
+      }
+    ]
+  },
+  "websocket_reconnect": {
+    "default_transport": "web_socket",
+    "description": "Verify reconnection after connection drop",
+    "scenario_id": "websocket.reconnect_after_drop",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "action": "connect",
+        "path": "/ws",
+        "transport": "web_socket"
+      },
+      {
+        "action": "assert_health",
+        "expected": "connected"
+      },
+      {
+        "action": "inject_fault",
+        "fault": {
+          "kind": "connection_drop"
+        }
+      },
+      {
+        "action": "assert_health",
+        "expected": "reconnecting"
+      },
+      {
+        "action": "wait",
+        "duration": "2000ms"
+      },
+      {
+        "action": "assert_health",
+        "expected": "connected"
+      },
+      {
+        "action": "assert_reconnect_count",
+        "expected": 1
+      },
+      {
+        "action": "disconnect"
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+{

+  "capability_id": "cap:invoke",

+  "holder_node": "node-b",
+  "target_instance": "connector-1",
+  "operations": ["invoke", "read"],
+  "token_id": [1, 2, 3, 4],
+  "audience_binary": [0, 1, 2, 3],
+  "grant_objects": [[9, 9, 9]],
+  "checkpoint_id": [170, 187],
+  "checkpoint_seq": 7,
+  "issued_at": 1700000000,
+  "not_before": 1700000000,
+  "expiration": 1700003600,
+  "include_subject": true,
+  "include_audience": true,
+  "include_zone_id": true,
+  "include_principal_id": true,
+  "include_issuing_node": true,
+  "include_holder_node": true,
+  "include_target_instance": true,
+  "include_operations": true,
+  "include_token_id": true,
+  "include_audience_binary": true,
+  "include_grant_objects": true,
+  "include_checkpoint": true
+}
